top_signals.title: BOJ’s Himino sees risk of price trend rising above 2% target
top_signals.summary: The central bank deputy governor warned that it could be forced to conduct more rapid interest rate hikes later on if it is late with necessary adjustments.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Ambition to end era of ‘outsourcing by default’ as government looks to bring cleaners and security staff in-house
top_signals.summary: The government has published new guidance to provide a route for bringing key services back in-house and get the absolute best results for taxpayers.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Potential liquidity or banking-system instability affecting financial conditions.

top_signals.title: South Africa’s $218 Billion Fund Again Rocked by Governance Woes
top_signals.summary: Africa’s biggest fund manager is again tangled up in a governance and management crisis, while its unlisted investments continue to underperform.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Months after scam crackdown, thousands remain stuck in Cambodia
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Burnham’s win should worry Farage
top_signals.summary: Fear of a Reform victory led Makerfield voters — including some 2024 Conservatives — to tactically vote Labour
